description: Regression gates for `python -m evals.runner --check`. Floors reflect the 2026-06-11 Phase 1 final run (30 questions, DISTANCE_GATE_THRESHOLD=0.4175, reranker off): overall 100%, no-false-grounding 100%, Recall@5 0.917, MRR 0.808, nDCG@5 0.816, faithfulness 1.0. no_false_archive_grounding_rate is the product guarantee and gates at 100; ranking/faithfulness floors leave headroom for question-set noise.
